label: TensorFeed AI Data Hub
description: AI-ecosystem data hub built for AI agents. Serves 100+ machine-readable data feeds covering AI industry news, model and GPU pricing, live AI service status and uptime, AI-stack CVE intelligence, and dated leaderboard history. Free REST API with no auth, plus x402/USDC premium endpoints settled on Base. This is a read-only data API, not a task-executing agent.

skills.description: Aggregated AI industry news plus a cross-source corroborated verified feed. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/news and https://tensorfeed.ai/api/verified-feed
Current model API pricing and GPU rental pricing across providers. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/pricing and https://tensorfeed.ai/api/gpu-pricing
Live status, incident history, and uptime for AI providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, with an early-warning outage signal. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/status
AI-stack CVE feed with affected products, version ranges, severity, and exploited-in-wild signals, plus an AI supply-chain IOC feed. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/ai-cves/latest

Dated daily snapshots of the Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 and pointers to every live public AI leaderboard. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/hf-leaderboard/latest and https://tensorfeed.ai/api/public-leaderboards
